sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this Tier 3 empirical game

special_mechanics.name: Hero Summoning
special_mechanics.description: Player can collect hidden items throughout levels to summon Marvel heroes (Captain America, Black Cat, Iron Fist, Cloak and Dagger, Deathlok, Morbius, Firestar) for assistance. Summoned heroes provide different tactical support depending on which character summoned them.

tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical/qualitative data. Wikipedia source provides only gameplay description and critical reception. No physics parameters, movement speeds, gravity values, or sub-pixel system details are documented. Game criticized for control issues and limited combat mechanics. Two 16-bit versions (Genesis and SNES) are virtually identical.
sources_used: wikipedia - Spider-Man and Venom: Maximum Carnage article
